result.text:
🚀 BREAKING NEWS: KANSTAR VALIDATOR GOES LIVE ON @Ronin_Network MARCH 3RD!

The rewards we earn as a Validator will be pure rocket fuel:
⚡ 50% for $KANSTAR buybacks.
⚡ 25% for Kanstar NFTs buybacks.
⚡ 25% powering the Kind/Kanstar Team

We’re ALL IN on Ronin 🔥 These actions drive long-term sustainability and growth for the Kanstar Ecosystem.

To our early believers: this is your moment. The engines are igniting—don’t miss liftoff. Kanstar is more than a project—it’s evolution, a vision, a family, a global IP in the making.

Shoutout to our Legendary Kanstar Whales, Hodlers, Creators, Artists, Team, the Ronin Community, our Partners, and the Sky Mavis Squad—you mean the world to us.

Let’s emBARK on this new journey. Together 🫡
